title: phyllanthus urinaria
intro: Phyllanthus urinaria, also known as amrakh or urvaruk, is a small, herbaceous plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus urinaria include its ability to protect against liver disease, lower blood sugar levels, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. Phyllanthus urinaria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
